element_introduction_order.mastery_context: player learns fundamental shot mechanics with minimal ball count
introduces scoring strategy beyond simple pocketing
adds spatial planning and sequencing discipline
later levels demand complex spatial awareness and shot planning with 9+ balls
optional advanced technique for positioning and complex shots
advanced curved shot technique for obstacle avoidance
advanced aerial shot technique for unreachable targets
failure state: two consecutive scratches or misses = life loss

typical_relief_triggers: advancing to next level after score threshold
typical_tension_triggers: approaching two-miss limit before life loss
time pressure from bonus round star
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: turn-based tension escalation; difficulty ramps through ball proliferation and positioning constraints; bonuses create moment-to-moment relief cycles

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: flashing star pockets appear dynamically; trick shot challenges are optional bonus modes

difficulty_curve.early_game: Level 1 introduces basic pocketing with low ball count and generous life pool (5 lives); focuses on mechanical learning
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Levels 2-3 increase ball count and introduce consecutive-shot and numerical-order requirements; spatial complexity rises; bonus pocket timing becomes critical
difficulty_curve.late_game: Level 4 features maximum ball density and all learned mechanics applied simultaneously; player must juggle multiple constraints: sequencing, positioning, English, advanced shots
notable_spikes: transition from Level 1 to Level 2 when numerical-order requirement gates progress
ball count proliferation creating exponential planning complexity
trick shot mode presents isolated high-difficulty challenges on demand

notable_level_patterns.description: each successive level adds more balls to the table; forces players to re-master positioning and shot planning under increasing constraint density
player must achieve predetermined score threshold to advance; combines points from basic pockets, consecutive bonuses, numerical sequences, and star bonuses
optional mode with 19 discrete challenge levels; each requires potting all balls into select pockets in single shot; difficulty increases per challenge
missing or scratching once is recoverable; second consecutive failure costs a life; creates binary tension cycles within each turn sequence
